metadata.description: Personal Claude Code extensions — dev workflow helpers and more.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Universal dev workflow — branch naming conventions, ticket-driven branch creation, and pre-PR documentation sync.

plugins.name: git-platform
plugins.description: Unified MCP server for GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket — PR create / list / view / merge / approve / comment / decline, auto-detected from the repo's git remote.
